caption: In a large, brightly lit banquet hall featuring a blue carpet and ornate ceiling chandeliers, five men are performing a synchronized dance routine. In the center, a man dressed in a vibrant blue traditional garment leads the movements, while two men to his left wear white traditional attire and a man to his right wears white. To the far right, another man is dressed in black. They are all captured mid-motion, performing fluid, rhythmic steps and arm movements. In the background, a seated audience watches from tables. As the sequence progresses, the dancers shift their weight and adjust their arm positions in unison, moving with a coordinated flow across the floor. The lighting remains consistent across the scenes, highlighting the contrasting colors of the traditional costumes against the deep blue of the carpeted stage area.
